# cirro_user (Resource)

Invites a user to Cirro and manages their profile. Destroying this resource removes it from state only — Cirro does not expose a user deletion API.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "cirro_user" "example" {
  name         = "Jane Smith"
  email        = "jane@example.com"
  organization = "Acme Corp"
  department   = "Bioinformatics"
  job_title    = "Senior Scientist"
  global_roles = ["pipeline-developers"]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `email` (String) Email address. Used to look up the user after invitation.
- `name` (String) Full name (3-70 characters).
- `organization` (String) Organization name (2-40 characters).

### Optional

- `department` (String) Department.
- `global_roles` (List of String) Global roles assigned to the user. Allowed values: administrators, sys-admins, pipeline-developers, and app-developers.
- `job_title` (String) Job title.
- `phone` (String) Phone number.

### Read-Only

- `username` (String) Cirro-assigned username (populated after invite).
